frame_analyses.description: Setup view showing red foam appendage on board with two black marks visible, laparoscopic instruments positioned outside working area
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear view of target marks on foam appendage, instruments not yet engaged

frame_analyses.description: Both graspers engaged, right instrument appears to be holding needle, positioning for suture placement
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instruments working in coordination, needle control visible

frame_analyses.description: Needle being advanced through foam appendage at first mark location, precise positioning visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good needle angle and control during tissue penetration

frame_analyses.description: Needle passed through foam, suture visible crossing between the two black marks on appendage
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture appears well-positioned between marks, no obvious deviation

frame_analyses.description: Instruments withdrawn, hands visible outside trainer forming extracorporeal knot with suture tails
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Transition to extracorporeal phase, suture tails accessible for knot formation

frame_analyses.description: Knot formation continuing outside trainer, surgeon's hands manipulating suture ends
Knot pusher introduced through trocar, advancing formed knot down toward tissue
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper knot pusher technique, advancing knot along suture

frame_analyses.description: Knot being seated at tissue level, pusher maintaining tension while securing knot position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good knot advancement and seating technique

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of suture placement between marks and knot formation process. Camera angle provides good view of critical steps. Completion time estimation based on visible phases.
cannot_determine: Exact mm measurements of mark deviation due to video resolution and angle
Final suture tail cutting - not visible in provided frames
technique_summary: Competent intermediate-to-expert level performance with efficient extracorporeal knot formation and good suture placement accuracy. Total time of 105 seconds is within expert range.
improvement_suggestions: Could potentially reduce needle loading time from 20s to under 15s
Overall excellent technique with minimal room for improvement
